name: Field of Greens Wilted Spinach w/ Lemon And
recipeIngredient: 2-4 cloves garlic, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort through the spinach, discarding stems and bruised or yellow leaves.
2. Wash the spinach in plenty of cold water. If sandy, wash a second time, then spin dry on paper towels.
3. Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and lemon juice to the hot oil.
5. Sauté for 1 minute.
6. Turn up the heat to high.
7. Add spinach to the pan, along with 1/4 teaspoon salt and a few pinches of pepper.
8. Wilt the spinach by tossing it with tongs, coating the leaves with hot oil and garlic.
9. Toss in the toasted pine nuts.
10. Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
11. Serve immediately.
To toast pine nuts:
1. Place the nuts in a dry skillet over very low heat.
2. Stir or shake the pan occasionally until the nuts are golden and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
